name: Kingdom
desc: A small peaceful country. Long ago, [name('The middle kingdom')] was part of [name('the holy empire')] but it's now looking for independence.

name: Empire
desc: Ultranationalist, Militarist, and Religious. [name('The holy empire')] controls the largest territory. Our story begins when they invaded [name('the middle kingdom')].

name: Nations
desc: A democratic agglomeration of states. [name('The united nations')] has ideals of Freedom and Economic Progress.

name: Dynasty
desc: [name('The millenium dynasty')] has a rich and unique history. [name('Dynasts')] are proud people, only recently did they open up to the rest of the world.
